description_long: This is a large, multi-building apartment complex situated on a landscaped green plot with internal roads and pathways. The buildings are mid-rise, featuring a modern architectural style with clean lines, flat roofs, and multiple balconies on each floor. The facades are predominantly light-colored, with large, regularly spaced windows and some darker accent elements. The complex is organized in a U-shaped or clustered arrangement, creating semi-private courtyards and communal spaces between the buildings. The surrounding area includes paved roads, driveways, and green lawns, suggesting integration with a suburban or urban neighborhood. The overall design emphasizes functionality, community living, and access to outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-building apartment complex with flat roofs, balconies, and light facades, set within landscaped grounds and internal roads.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the main entrance area, central courtyard, and the clustered arrangement of the apartment buildings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout of the complex, the internal roads, and the stepped arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back facades, additional balconies, and the green space behind the buildings.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view displaying the full extent of the complex, the road network, and the distribution of green areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with even spacing and alignment across all floors, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly facade.
